batches.title: Soft-Boiled Eggs & Sourdough Toast (Breakfasts)
steps: Bring large pot of water to a boil
Gently add 14 large eggs, set timer for 6 minutes
Meanwhile, preheat oven to 180°C
After 6 minutes, transfer eggs to ice bath, cool completely (5–10 min), peel gently under cold water
Store peeled eggs in airtight container in fridge
Slice sourdough loaf into 7 slices (35g each)
Lay slices on baking tray, toast in 180°C oven 4–5 minutes until golden
Cool toasted sourdough completely, store in airtight container at room temperature or in fridge
yields: 14 soft-boiled eggs (1 per day, with 0 spare)

day_of_assembly.Monday: Breakfast — Soft-Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Feta & Berries: place 1 chilled egg in egg cup, serve 1 toasted sourdough slice + 30g crumbled feta + 150g mixed berries on separate small plate
day_of_assembly.Tuesday: Breakfast — Soft-Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Feta & Berries: place 1 chilled egg in egg cup, serve 1 toasted sourdough slice + feta cheese + mixed berries
day_of_assembly.Wednesday: Breakfast — Soft-Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Feta & Berries: assemble 1 egg + 1 toast slice + feta + berries on plate
day_of_assembly.Thursday: Breakfast — Soft-Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Feta & Berries: plate 1 soft egg, toast, feta, berries
day_of_assembly.Friday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (eggs cooked is only safe ~4 day(s); this is day 5).
day_of_assembly.Saturday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (eggs cooked is only safe ~4 day(s); this is day 6).
day_of_assembly.Sunday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (eggs cooked is only safe ~4 day(s); this is day 7).

storage.safety_note: Hard-boiled eggs: 1 week in shell, 5 days peeled in water. Scrambled/cooked dishes: 3–4 days.

batches.title: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Quinoa (Monday Lunch)
steps: Pat dry 700g chicken breast, place in shallow bowl
Make marinade: juice 3 lemons, 3 tbsp (45ml) olive oil, 2 tsp dried oregano, 4 cloves minced garlic, salt & pepper
Pour marinade over chicken, cover, refrigerate 30 minutes minimum (or proceed immediately for time)
Heat grill or grill pan to high, brush with oil
Grill chicken 6–7 minutes per side until internal temp 75°C, set aside to cool 5 minutes
Once cool, portion into 7 containers (100g each for portion tracking, weigh before storing)
Deseed and chop 300g bell peppers + 300g zucchini into 2cm chunks
Toss 600g total veg with 2 tsp olive oil, 1 tsp oregano, salt & pepper on a roasting tray
Roast at 200°C for 20 minutes until tender and lightly caramelised, stir halfway
Cool completely, portion into containers
Rinse 200g dry quinoa, bring 400ml salted water to boil in a pot
Add quinoa, cover, reduce heat to low, simmer 12–13 minutes until water absorbed
Fluff with fork, cool completely, portion into 7 containers (85–90g cooked per day)

day_of_assembly.Monday: Lunch — Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Veg & Quinoa: reheat 180g chicken + 100g roasted veg in pan (2 min), warm 120g quinoa (1 min), plate together, drizzle 2 tsp fresh olive oil, squeeze lemon, scatter fresh parsley (5g)

storage.safety_note: Cool quickly; never leave poultry at room temp > 2 h. Reheat to 74 °C through.

batches.title: Asian Chicken Stir-Fry with Bok Choy & Brown Rice (Tuesday Lunch)
steps: Cut 700g chicken breast into bite-sized cubes (2cm)
Heat 2 tsp sesame oil in a large wok or deep pan over high heat
Add 4 cloves minced garlic + 1 tbsp minced fresh ginger, stir-fry 30 seconds until fragrant
Add chicken cubes, stir-fry 8–10 minutes until cooked through (no pink)
Add 1.5 tsp low-sodium soy sauce, mix well, taste and adjust seasoning
Transfer to a plate, cool completely
Chop 350g bok choy into 3cm pieces (greens and stalks separated)
Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in the same wok, add bok choy stalks first, stir-fry 1 minute
Add greens, stir-fry 1 more minute until just tender-crisp and bright green
Add cooked chicken back to wok, toss 30 seconds, cool completely
Portion chicken + bok choy mix into 7 containers
Rinse 180g dry brown rice, cook in 360ml salted water per rice packet instructions (~18–20 min)
Fluff with fork, cool completely, portion into 7 containers (77g cooked per day)

day_of_assembly.Tuesday: Lunch — Asian Chicken Stir-Fry with Bok Choy & Brown Rice: reheat 180g chicken + bok choy mix in pan (2 min), warm 110g cooked brown rice (1 min), plate rice as base, top with chicken & bok choy, sprinkle 5g sesame seeds + fresh ginger shreds (3g)

storage.safety_note: Cool quickly; never leave poultry at room temp > 2 h. Reheat to 74 °C through.

batches.title: Spiced Chicken with Roasted Eggplant & Carrots + Lentils (Wednesday Lunch)
steps: Cube 700g chicken breast into 2–3cm pieces
Season cubed chicken with 2 tsp ground cumin, 1 tsp paprika, salt, pepper, 2 cloves minced garlic; mix well
Heat 2 tsp olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat
Pan-fry seasoned chicken 10–12 minutes, stirring occasionally, until cooked through and golden edges
Transfer to plate, cool completely, portion into 7 containers
Cube 300g eggplant + 250g carrots into 2cm pieces
Toss 550g total veg with 1 tsp olive oil, 1 tsp ground cumin, salt & pepper on roasting tray
Roast at 200°C for 20 minutes until tender and caramelised, stir halfway
Cool completely, portion into 7 containers
Open 2 cans (800g) lentils, drain, rinse thoroughly under cold water
Warm rinsed lentils gently in a small pot (2–3 min) with a splash of water if needed
Cool completely, portion into 7 containers (42g cooked lentils per portion)

day_of_assembly.Wednesday: Lunch — Spiced Chicken Bowl with Roasted Vegetables & Canned Lentils: reheat 180g cumin chicken + 100g roasted eggplant & carrots in pan (2 min), warm 100g lentils (1 min), plate together, drizzle 0.5 tsp olive oil, garnish 5g fresh parsley

storage.safety_note: Cool quickly; never leave poultry at room temp > 2 h. Reheat to 74 °C through.

batches.title: Mexican-Style Chicken Lettuce Wraps with Roasted Peppers & White Beans (Thursday Lunch)
steps: Cube 700g chicken breast into 2cm pieces
Season chicken with 2 tsp ground cumin, 1 tsp chilli flakes (or less if sensitive), juice of 2 limes, salt, pepper; toss well
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat
Pan-fry seasoned chicken 10–12 minutes until cooked through, stirring occasionally
Transfer to plate, cool completely, portion into 7 containers
Slice 280g mixed bell peppers (red, yellow) into 1cm strips
Toss peppers with 1 tsp olive oil, 1 tsp paprika, salt & pepper on roasting tray
Roast at 200°C for 15 minutes until tender and lightly charred, stir halfway
Cool completely, portion into 7 containers
Open 2 cans (800g) white beans, drain, rinse thoroughly under cold water
Warm rinsed beans gently in a small pot (2 min), add 0.5 tsp lime juice, stir, cool completely
Portion into 7 containers (40g cooked beans per serving)

day_of_assembly.Thursday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (poultry is only safe ~3 day(s); this is day 4).

storage.safety_note: Cool quickly; never leave poultry at room temp > 2 h. Reheat to 74 °C through.

batches.title: Lemon-Herb Grilled Chicken with Chickpea Salad (Sunday Lunch)
steps: Pat dry 700g chicken breast, place in shallow dish
Make marinade: juice 4 lemons, 3 tbsp (45ml) olive oil, 2 tsp dried oregano, 1 tsp fresh thyme (or 0.5 tsp dried), 4 cloves minced garlic, salt & pepper
Pour marinade over chicken, cover, refrigerate 30 minutes minimum
Heat grill or grill pan to high, brush with oil
Grill chicken 6–7 minutes per side until internal temp 75°C, rest 5 minutes
Cool completely, portion into 7 containers (100g each)
Open 2 cans (800g) chickpeas, drain, rinse thoroughly under cold water
Dice 150g bell pepper (red or yellow), 150g cucumber
In a large bowl, combine rinsed chickpeas, diced pepper, diced cucumber, 1.5 tsp olive oil, juice of 1 lemon, salt & pepper, mix gently
Cool completely, portion into 7 containers (40g chickpea salad per serving)
Wash and dry 200g fresh rocket, store in airtight container lined with paper towel
yields: 200g fresh rocket (bulk, portioned fresh each day)

day_of_assembly.Sunday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (poultry is only safe ~3 day(s); this is day 7).

storage.safety_note: Cool quickly; never leave poultry at room temp > 2 h. Reheat to 74 °C through.
